# form.field.Text: height config does not work as expected

low prio, since we mostly rely on the default styling via CSS.

however, it would be nice if applying a new custom height via the `height` config was possible.

only tested it inside `Neo.examples.form.field.text.MainContainer` => labelPosition: 'inline'.
